summary: Iteration 18 - Observer Mode Kiosk Flow Fix - All tests PASSED. Backend: 10/10 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 11 features verified working correctly. The fix correctly shows ObserverActiveScreen instead of SetupScreen when AUTODARTS_MODE=observer and board is unlocked.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session returns autodarts_mode='observer' alongside board_status and session
Backend: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock creates session with valid response (id, pricing_mode, credits, status)
Backend: After unlock, board_status='unlocked' and autodarts_mode='observer'
Backend: GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/observer-status returns state, credits_remaining, pricing_mode
Backend: POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game returns should_lock=false when credits > 0
Backend: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock locks board successfully
Backend: When board is locked, session is null
Backend: per_time pricing mode returns expires_at
Backend: observer-status includes pricing_mode field
Backend: observer-status includes session_expires_at for per_time mode
Frontend: After unlock with AUTODARTS_MODE=observer, kiosk shows ObserverActiveScreen (data-testid='observer-active-screen')
Frontend: SetupScreen (data-testid='setup-screen') is NOT displayed in observer mode
Frontend: ObserverActiveScreen shows credits count (data-testid='observer-credits') = 3
Frontend: ObserverActiveScreen shows observer state label (data-testid='observer-state-label') = 'Bereit'
Frontend: ObserverActiveScreen shows 'Personal rufen' button (data-testid='observer-call-staff-btn')
Frontend: ObserverActiveScreen shows 'Session beenden' button (data-testid='observer-end-session-btn')
Frontend: Clicking 'Session beenden' shows confirmation dialog with 'Abbrechen' and 'Bestaetigen' buttons
Frontend: Clicking 'Bestaetigen' calls end-game API
Frontend: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock returns kiosk to LockedScreen (data-testid='locked-screen')
Frontend: LockedScreen shows 'GESPERRT' text and lock icon
seed_data_creation: Board BOARD-1 was unlocked with 3 credits for testing, then locked for final state verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested the observer mode kiosk flow fix. Key points: 1) AUTODARTS_MODE=observer is set in backend/.env. 2) GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session returns autodarts_mode field (alongside board_status and session). 3) When autodarts_mode='observer' and board is unlocked, KioskLayout.js renders ObserverActiveScreen instead of SetupScreen. 4) ObserverActiveScreen has data-testid='observer-active-screen' with observer-credits, observer-state-label, observer-call-staff-btn, observer-end-session-btn. 5) The start-game endpoint is NOT required for normal observer flow - customer starts game directly in Autodarts. 6) Credits are decremented by observer when game starts (not by end-game button). 7) POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game only locks board when credits_remaining <= 0.

key_implementation_verified.KioskLayout.js_routing: Lines 196-224: Routes to ObserverActiveScreen when autodartsMode==='observer' for both 'setup' and 'in_game' states
